warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
4x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 21 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
06:00 4 @ 70%
Hold 4 Sets
09:00 4 @ 80%
12:00 4 @ 80%
15:00 4 @ 80%
18:00 4 @ 80%

metcon.name: Tillman
metcon.description:
7 Rounds For Time:
7 Deadlifts @ 143/93
200m Sprint
15 Pull Ups
45 second Rest

Patrick Daniel Tillman (11/6/76–4/22/04) was a professional football player who played for the Arizona Cardinals, but left the National Football League and enlisted in the United States Army in May 2002 after 9/11 occurred.

Tillman joined the Army Rangers and served multiple tours in combat before he was killed in the mountains of Afghanistan. He was a recipient of the Silver Star, the third highest honour in the military, and a Purple Heart. Pat is survived by his wife Marie. He is also remembered through the foundation named in his honour.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and pull-ups dominate posterior chain; accessory work targets anterior/lateral muscles for balanced development.

Tillman joined the Army Rangers and served multiple tours in combat before he was killed in the mountains of Afghanistan. siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 4 at 80 percent. Metcon: Tillman. Rounds for Time: 7 Deadlifts @ 143/93, 200m Sprint, 15 Pull Ups, Tillman joined the Army Rangers and served multiple tours in combat before he was killed in the mountains of Afghanistan. He was a recipient of the Silver Star, the third highest honour in the military, and a Purple Heart. Pat is survived by his wife Marie. He is also remembered through the foundation named in his honour.. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (lateral), biceps.
